allow: Bash(powershell.exe -command "npm create vite@latest client -- --template vanilla && cd client && npm install && npm install phaser")

Bash(powershell.exe -command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force src, public, counter.js -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force src/scenes, src/entities, src/levels, src/systems | Out-Null; Write-Host ''Done''")
